description: Literature support library for: LDCT/multimodal/AI vs cfDNA methylation MCED in lung cancer screening
research_question: Comparison of LDCT, routine physical exam multimodal/AI models, and cfDNA methylation MCED for lung cancer screening performance (AUC, sensitivity, specificity)

categories.cat1_cfdna_methylation_mced: cfDNA methylation-based multi-cancer early detection (MCED) studies — standalone liquid biopsy methylation panels
categories.cat2_single_modality_screening: Single imaging/biomarker modality screening — LDCT, FIT, PSA, or other single-modality approaches
categories.cat3_physical_exam_traditional_model: Physical exam / routine checkup data combined with traditional statistical models (logistic regression, Cox, etc.)
categories.cat4_physical_exam_ai_model: Physical exam / routine checkup data combined with AI/deep learning/multimodal models
categories.cat5_methylation_multimodal: Methylation integrated with multimodal data (imaging + liquid biopsy, cfDNA + clinical features, etc.) — priority category

filer_fields.title: string — paper title
filer_fields.modality: string — primary modality detected from title/abstract
filer_fields.include_decision: boolean — true if passes inclusion criteria
filer_fields.exclusion_reason: string or null — reason for exclusion if include_decision=false
filer_fields.probable_relevance_score: float 0.0-1.0 — estimated relevance to research question

extraction_fields.study_design: RCT / prospective_cohort / retrospective_cohort / case_control / cross_sectional / other
extraction_fields.input_modalities: list — cfDNA_methylation / LDCT / CT / blood_protein / clinical_features / imaging / other
extraction_fields.model_type: deep_learning / logistic_regression / Cox / SVM / random_forest / ensemble / other / null
extraction_fields.comparator: string description of comparison arm or null

scoring_fields.relevance: 0-25 — direct relevance to lung cancer screening / cfDNA methylation / MCED / LDCT / AI multimodal
scoring_fields.design_quality: 0-25 — study design quality (prospective > retrospective > case-control; sample size; validation approach)
scoring_fields.metric_comparability: 0-20 — completeness of AUC/sensitivity/specificity with confidence intervals
scoring_fields.impact: 0-15 — journal tier / citation count / landmark study status
scoring_fields.category: one of the 5 category keys above
